title: spermacoce hedyotidea
intro: Spermacoce hedyotidea, also known as the yellow vine or yellow wood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Spermacoce hedyotidea include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an anthelmintic and antiseptic. Spermacoce hedyotidea is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and its leaves can also be used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas and poultices.
